title: Architect Test Suites for CI/CD Pipelines
description: Architect efficient test suites optimized for CI/CD pipelines, utilizing parallelization techniques. Implement strategies for detecting and managing flaky tests to ensure pipeline stability. Apply "affected" test logic to reduce test execution time and improve developer velocity.
objectives: Architect efficient test suites optimized for CI/CD pipelines, utilizing parallelization techniques.
